items.title: Food prices have soared 50% in just five years as the cost-of-living crisis bites
items.desc: Analysis suggests that the 'grim milestone', expected to be reached in November, will match the price rises in food seen in the 20 years prior to 2021 - the start of the cost-of-living crisis.

items.title: Former guerrillas learn about birding in Colombia

items.title: Birds flourish in Colombian region once home to guerrilla groups
items.desc: In Colombia, decades of fighting between the government, left-wing guerrillas, right-wing paramilitaries, and narco-traffickers preserved bird habitats in Colombia.
